subcodes.first_line: God willing, by the grace of the Friend, mayest thou be detached and free from all save Him, and at all times partake of the celestial wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت دوست از آنچه غیر اوست فارغ و آزاد باشی و در کل احیان رحیق
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
